zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac於大約1360年出生在法國時，他的父親Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez28歲，母親Jeanne de PÉRIGORD21歲。他於1393年12月2日之後與Bonne de Berry結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1418年6月12日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年59歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac于大约1360年出生在法国时，他的父亲Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez28岁，母亲Jeanne de PÉRIGORD21岁。他于1393年12月2日之后与Bonne de Berry结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1418年6月12日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲享年59岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac was born about 1360, in France, his father, Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez, was 28 and his mother, Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, was 21. He married Bonne de Berry after 2 December 1393. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 12 June 1418, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 59, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac est né environ 1360, à France, son père, Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Bonne de Berry après 2 décembre 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juin 1418, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac um 1360 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez 28 und seine Mutter Jeanne de PÉRIGORD 21. Er hat nach 2. Dezember 1393 Bonne de Berry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juni 1418 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac è nato il circa 1360 nel Francia, il suo padre, Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Bonne de Berry dopo il 2 dicembre 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 12 giugno 1418, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnacが約1360年にフランスで生まれた時，父Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodezは28歳，母Jeanne de PÉRIGORDは21歳であった。1393年12月2日以後にBonne de Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1418年6月12日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで59歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac(이)가 대략 1360년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de PÉRIGORD(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1393년 12월 2일 이후 Bonne de Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1418년 6월 12일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac nasceu aproximadamente 1360, em França, seu pai, Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Bonne de Berry após 2 de dezembro de 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de junho de 1418, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac родился около 1360 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Bonne de Berry после 2 декабрь 1393 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 12 июня 1418 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard VII of of Armagnac Count of Armagnac nació aproximadamente 1360, en Francia, su papá, Jean d'Armagnac II "the Hunchback"   Comte de Armagne, Fezenac, Rodez, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Jeanne de PÉRIGORD, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Bonne de Berry después de 2 de diciembre de 1393. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 12 de junio de 1418, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
